creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As ken1@earthlink.net wrote:

> >Description:
> When I go to make the boot disk for FreeBSD 2.2.2 off the CDROM I get a 
> read error every time I try to make it.  I have tried on 3 computers and all
> didn't work.
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Use CD to make boot disks on 3 1/4" floppy

I don't have one. :-)  Or did you perhaps mean 3.5" floppies?

Well, this merely sounds like a problem with your CD-ROM medium.  Get
in contact with Walnut Creek CDROM for a replacement.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
